overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of a flooded urban plaza at night. The player walks through shallow water toward a lootable bag, collects a data shard, then pans to view the neon-lit city skyline across the water.

scene_state.functional_zone: flooded urban plaza with neon city backdrop

agents.ego_description: walking through shallow water in a flooded plaza toward a canvas bag visible in the distance

entered.detail: shallow water covering the ground reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings
distant city buildings illuminated with colorful neon signs and advertisements
prominent skyscraper with vertical lighting standing against the night sky
partially submerged vehicle wreckage visible in the dark water
tan canvas bag sitting on the ground in the water, becoming more visible as the player approaches

segments.scene_description: The player walks through a flooded urban plaza at night, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance. The shallow water reflects the colorful city lights as the player approaches a canvas bag lying on the ground.

events.description: player opens the canvas bag and takes a data shard item labeled 'Archive Conversation: Tree Faction and the Human Polity'

agents.ego_description: crouching down to search the canvas bag and collect the data shard inside

segments.scene_description: The player reaches the canvas bag and interacts with it, the camera tilting down to focus on the container. The city skyline is no longer visible as the player loots a data shard from the bag.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with panoramic city view

events.description: camera pans left to reveal the illuminated city skyline across the water

agents.ego_description: turning to observe the neon-lit cityscape while continuing to walk along the waterfront

entered.detail: cluster of illuminated buildings along the waterfront with various neon signs
large glowing advertisement screen on the side of a building
raised walkway or edge along the water boundary

segments.scene_description: After looting the bag, the player moves away and pans left to take in the expansive neon city skyline across the water. The camera reveals more of the illuminated waterfront buildings and billboards as the player continues exploring the flooded plaza.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a flooded urban plaza at night, moving from a focused interaction with a discarded object back to a wide view of a neon skyline. It begins with the camera gliding through shallow water that reflects the vibrant city lights as it approaches a canvas bag on the ground. As the player reaches the bag, the camera tilts downward to focus on the container, momentarily obscuring the horizon to loot a data shard. The scene then shifts as the player moves away, panning left to reveal the expansive, illuminated waterfront buildings and glowing billboards. Finally, the view opens up to take in the full scale of the neon-lit skyscrapers towering across the water.
